templates.label: Starter (Python / uv) — deploy a process, create an instance, run a worker

toolchain.installHint: `uv` was not found. Install the uv Python project manager (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh, or brew install uv) so `uv` is on PATH. `uv run` auto-provisions a Python 3.10+ interpreter and installs dependencies from pyproject.toml. Until then, Python projects cannot run.
